generatedBy: FOR-461 D50 GM dashboard candidate inventory

candidates.referencePlan: Candidate-specific Skia GM capture for nearest and linear bitmap rect cells.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU bitmap sampling oracle with explicit rect/subset coordinates.
candidates.gpuExpectation: WebGPU bitmap sampling route with fallbackReason=none for selected cells.
candidates.risk: Keep sampler modes bounded; no mipmap, codec, color-managed decode, or tiled image claim.

candidates.referencePlan: Candidate-specific Skia GM capture for small bitmap rect draw.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU bitmap oracle for bounded source/destination rect sampling.
candidates.gpuExpectation: WebGPU texture sampling route with nearest/linear cells only.
candidates.risk: Tiny source dimensions can expose rounding; reject rather than lowering thresholds.

candidates.referencePlan: Candidate-specific Skia GM capture or existing premul bitmap fixture.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU premultiplied-alpha bitmap oracle.
candidates.gpuExpectation: WebGPU bitmap route preserving premul source color.
candidates.risk: Alpha premultiplication mismatch must become a diff/root-cause item, not a threshold change.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture for a static decoded image cell already available to the test.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU image draw oracle after decode, with decode provenance recorded.
candidates.gpuExpectation: WebGPU upload plus sampler route for bounded image draw.
candidates.risk: No broad codec support claim; use only fixtures already delivered by the test.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture for static image-source subset.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU image-source oracle with fixture path and color type recorded.
candidates.gpuExpectation: WebGPU image sampling route when resource upload is deterministic.
candidates.risk: Do not include YUV, animated, EXIF, or unavailable codec cases.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture for scale/translate local-matrix image-shader cells.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU local-matrix bitmap shader oracle.
candidates.gpuExpectation: WebGPU bitmap shader route with explicit local matrix payload.
candidates.risk: Perspective and non-affine local matrices remain outside the selected cells.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture for bounded degenerate linear-gradient stop cases.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU gradient PipelineIR oracle for selected degenerate stops.
candidates.gpuExpectation: Generated WGSL gradient route with unchanged threshold policy.
candidates.risk: Do not broaden to all gradient degeneracies or two-point conical gradients.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture for one bounded offset image-filter cell.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU prepass/layer oracle with explicit input bounds.
candidates.gpuExpectation: WebGPU prepass/layer route with deterministic crop/output bounds.
candidates.risk: No arbitrary image-filter DAG or picture-prepass claim.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture for affine MatrixImageFilter subset.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU image-filter oracle with affine transform and bounded sample area.
candidates.gpuExpectation: WebGPU prepass plus sampler route for affine transform only.
candidates.risk: Perspective and complex filter-chain cells remain excluded.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture for small sigma bounded blur cell.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU blur oracle with bounded kernel radius.
candidates.gpuExpectation: WebGPU explicit prepass/layer route if bounds remain finite.
candidates.risk: Large sigma and unbounded blur variants remain deferred.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture for bounded axis-aligned AA clip cells.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU coverage/clip oracle with row-specific diagnostics.
candidates.gpuExpectation: WebGPU clip route for bounded AA clip geometry.
candidates.risk: Complex clip stacks and boolean path clips remain explicit refusals.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture for bounded filled path cells under edge budget.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU Path AA oracle with fill rule recorded.
candidates.gpuExpectation: WebGPU coverage route only for bounded edge-count cells.
candidates.risk: Over-budget paths must stay expected-unsupported.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture or formula fixture for bounded arithmetic coefficients.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU PipelineIR blend oracle.
candidates.gpuExpectation: Generated WGSL BlendPlan route when coefficients are selected and finite.
candidates.risk: No arbitrary arithmetic blend support claim.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture for sanitized paint-state cells only.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU paint-state oracle with invalid state normalized or refused explicitly.
candidates.gpuExpectation: WebGPU paint route for selected sanitized state.
candidates.risk: Undefined paint behavior must be rejected, not normalized silently.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture or Skia-derived formula fixture for selected mode filters.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU color-filter plus blend oracle.
candidates.gpuExpectation: Generated WGSL color-filter/blend route.
candidates.risk: No broad ColorFilter chain or color-space support claim.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture for rectangular clip-shader subset.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU clip plus shader oracle.
candidates.gpuExpectation: WebGPU clip/shader route with route diagnostics.
candidates.risk: Complex clip shader variants remain out of scope.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture for bounded convex polygon clip cells.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU convex clip coverage oracle.
candidates.gpuExpectation: WebGPU coverage route if edge budget and fill rule diagnostics pass.
candidates.risk: Refuse selected cells that exceed current edge policy.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture for small rect/poly stroke cells.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU stroke coverage oracle with cap/join metadata.
candidates.gpuExpectation: WebGPU coverage route only for bounded primitive strokes.
candidates.risk: Do not claim broad stroke outline, dash, cap, or join support.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture for nearest/linear bitmap filter cells.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU bitmap sampling/filtering oracle.
candidates.gpuExpectation: WebGPU sampler route for selected filter modes.
candidates.risk: No anisotropic, mipmap, tile-mode, or codec expansion.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture for affine transformed image-filter cell.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU filter oracle with affine bounds.
candidates.gpuExpectation: WebGPU prepass/layer route if transform remains affine and bounded.
candidates.risk: Perspective and arbitrary DAG cells remain refused.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture for bounded make-with-filter subset.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU image-filter oracle with output subset recorded.
candidates.gpuExpectation: WebGPU prepass/layer route when input/output bounds are explicit.
candidates.risk: Reject if picture prepass or unbounded crop is required.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture for visible complex clip boundary.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU/reference artifact may document the unsupported visual boundary.
candidates.gpuExpectation: Stable WebGPU refusal with complex clip fallback reason.
candidates.risk: Must not be counted as broad complex clip support.

candidates.referencePlan: Skia GM capture for cropped image-filter boundary.
candidates.cpuExpectation: CPU crop oracle may document required prepass behavior.
candidates.gpuExpectation: Stable refusal unless crop/prepass ownership is explicit.
candidates.risk: Do not claim arbitrary crop/null-input or picture prepass support.

candidates.referencePlan: Use only to scope registered descriptor coverage and refusal examples.
candidates.cpuExpectation: Registered Kotlin descriptor required before any support row.
candidates.gpuExpectation: Registered WGSL descriptor or explicit arbitrary-SkSL refusal.
candidates.risk: No dynamic SkSL compilation, SkSL VM, or arbitrary runtime shader support.

candidates.referencePlan: Track as a later text/glyph transform row after font evidence is available.
candidates.cpuExpectation: Bundled font CPU oracle and exact font provenance required.
candidates.gpuExpectation: Glyph mask/atlas route or stable font dependency refusal.
candidates.risk: Do not use substitute text rendering to clear dependency-gated glyph work.

lot1Recommendation.strategy: Start with bitmap rect/source/local-matrix rows, one bounded degenerate gradient, three bounded image-filter rows, and two bounded clip/path rows. This gives visible PM coverage while avoiding codec, text shaping, arbitrary DAG, and broad Path AA claims.
requiredPromotionEvidence: GPU artifact or stable expected-unsupported refusal
stable non-none fallback reason for expected-unsupported rows
unchanged dashboard thresholds and gate policy

exclusions.reason: Runtime image filters need registered descriptors before promotion; arbitrary SkSL/runtime image-filter input remains refused.
Combines text/glyph dependency and runtime shader behavior; not a clean D50 dashboard-expansion candidate.
Two-point conical gradients remain outside the existing bounded linear/sweep gradient support envelope.
Animated, YUV, EXIF, and codec-driven rows stay dependency-gated and must not use short-lived substitutes.
Dash, hairline, and broad stroke rows remain edge-budget/cap/join policy work until row-specific coverage evidence exists.

nonClaims: This inventory does not change any dashboard row status.
This inventory adds 0 support claims and 0 Skia-comparable fidelity claims.
Candidate rows are inventory-only until generated reference, CPU, GPU or refusal, diff/stat, and route artifacts exist.
Projected selected rows over 50 are selected-candidate planning capacity, not visual support percentage.
No global threshold, scoring rule, fallback policy, or PipelineKey axis is changed.
CPU-oracle and diagnostic-only rows do not count as Skia-comparable fidelity.
No broad Skia GM parity, arbitrary image-filter DAG, arbitrary SkSL, broad Path AA, glyph shaping, codec, or YUV support is claimed.
